text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove finishes her training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Phew... You head home first. I'd like to spend
some time alone.
choice_data_list: Are you going to do some solo practice?
Are you going to do some solo practice?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I need to address a few points that were
bothering me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you going to quibble about how I use my free
time?
choice_data_list: I'll use my free time to join you.
I'd like you to get a proper rest.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As ridiculous as ever, I see.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But do as you please. It's your own time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stick with Air Groove until she finishes up her
solo practice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand what you're saying, but I know my
limits better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have deemed myself capable of a little more
training, so I'd prefer if you keep such
unnecessary comments to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're going to concoct a regimen that won't
leave me with any energy for solo practice, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well! If that's what you have in store for me,
I'll go easy on today's extra training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You'd better have a new regimen for me by our
next training session. Are we clear?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having agreed to make a training regimen more
suited to Air Groove's wishes, we finish up for the
day.
